name: Viking Therapeutics, Inc.
business: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development of novel, first-in-class or best-in-class therapies for metabolic and endocrine disorders.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development of novel, first-in-class or best-in-class therapies for metabolic and endocrine disorders.

catalysts.sentence: in September 2023, we initiated the VENTURE study, a Phase 2 clinical trial of VK2735 in patients with obesity.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 VANQUISH-1 and VANQUISH-2 studies
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, we announced the initiation of two Phase 3 clinical studies to evaluate the subcutaneous formulation of VK2735, VANQUISH-1 and VANQUISH-2.

catalysts.event: Completion of enrollment in VANQUISH-1 study
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we announced completion of enrollment in the VANQUISH-1 study.

catalysts.event: Initiation of exploratory Phase 1 maintenance dosing study
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we announced the initiation of an exploratory Phase 1 maintenance dosing study of VK2735.

catalysts.event: Completion of enrollment in Phase 1 maintenance dosing study
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we announced completion of enrollment in this study.
We plan to file an Investigational New Drug, or IND, application for this program in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 Oral dosing studies
catalysts.sentence: We expect to initiate Phase 3 Oral dosing studies in the third quarter of 2026.
